channel.title: Dimension 20's Adventuring Party
channel.description: Latest releases from Dimension 20's Adventuring Party on Dropout.tv

item.title: Two Hours in the Tesla Diner
item.description:
The cast discuss their discoveries around town, the herd, and infiltrating the city council.

Duration: 23:43

Tags: Dimension 20's Adventuring Party, Dimension 20, commentary, tabletop rpg, q and a, behind the scenes, game masters, role playing, RPG, City Council of Darkness, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan

item.title: It's a Banksy
item.description:
The cast drink blood and chat about the consequences of eating missiles.

Duration: 21:44

Tags: Dimension 20's Adventuring Party, Dimension 20, commentary, tabletop rpg, q and a, behind the scenes, game masters, role playing, RPG, City Council of Darkness, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan

item.title: Here's Come the Water
item.description:
Dragon Master Katie Marovitch and her people discuss the craft of D&D and get bejazzled.

Duration: 19:10

Tags: Dimension 20's Adventuring Party, Dimension 20, commentary, tabletop rpg, q and a, behind the scenes, game masters, role playing, RPG, D20 on a Bus, jasmine bhullar, aabria iyengar, matthew mercer, brennan lee mulligan, katie marovitch
